title: Instant Death Ability
overview: During a school trip, Yogiri and his classmates are summoned to another world. The students are granted abilities except Yogiri and Tomochika. Suddenly, a dragon approaches!

title: My Guardian Angel Is So Overpowered, This Other World Is a Piece of Cake!
overview: Yogiri and Tomochika search for their classmates and arrive at a nearby town. Inside the city walls, the two meet a seemingly kind beastkin who has ulterior motives.

title: The World Isn't So Kind As to Allow One-Sided Attacks
overview: Yogiri and company are reunited with classmate Yuki. Later, while staying at a hotel, Tomochika seems to have too much time on her hands!

title: The Fact That You're Watching This Video...
overview: Masayuki releases zombies to run amok in the city! Meanwhile, outside the city, Lain devises a plan to see how powerful Yogiri's "instant death ability" really is...

title: Alpha Omega
overview: Yogiri and his friends depart for the royal capital; however, a multitude of dragons stand in their way!

title: I'm Not So Rude As to Complain After Being Saved
overview: Yogiri and Tomochika are caught up in a trial. Something strange starts happening to Mokomoko.

title: Standard Opening of Gate Number One Confirmed
overview: The group heads to the basement of the Tower of Trials, where Theodisia's brethren are held captive. Meanwhile, on the ground, the Demon King's followers attack the tower.

title: The Agency
overview: In Yogiri’s childhood, Asaka Takato is assigned to care for and observe him. However, Asaka can’t stop him from being kidnapped and held hostage by the “organization.”

title: It's Like a Class Full of People Who Only Want to Save Themselves
overview: Yogiri and Tomochika arrive at the capital and must take on a demon at the king’s command. Meanwhile, several classmates know Yogiri's identity.

title: A Girl From the Past Appears. Tomochika is Bewildered...
overview: Yogiri senses the gaze and murderous intent of someone different. To lure out the culprit, he heads into the city with Tomochika.

title: Phase 2
overview: Sion orders sage candidates to kill each other until there is only one left. Meanwhile, Yogiri, who fell to the seventh layer of the demon world, aims to return to the sixth.

title: You Can Use Your Power Any Way You Want
overview: Yogiri and his friends go off script during the Sage Candidate Selection Battle to lure Sion out. Yogiri has a mission: find out how to return to his home world.
